title: Save Her Tour
description: This complex and relaxing puzzle game youve read about has finally become a reality! Only the smartest can pass these brain teaser quizzes and save the girl! Each level will give you a scenario where you must use your ingenuity to solve the problem. If you mess up, it wont end well for our heroine. There are so many different challenges waiting to be solved. This is the best puzzle game ever! Solve interesting puzzles, protect the girl from harm, and experience the thrill of success.
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play
